> Updated: 2026-06-26
> Affiliate links present

## About
21,000+ page USA affiliate site for Hers women's telehealth.
Covers all 50 states, 350 cities, 15 services, 20 competitors, 300 long-tail keywords.
Services: Ozempic, WeGovy, Jardiance, mental health, hair loss, skin care, birth control, menopause, PCOS.
